title: Fantasy Faire
desc: The Fairelands have returned! From the 23rd of April to the 10th of May, 20 incredible regions of extraordinary beauty bring the magic of Fantasy Faire to life once more, all in support of Relay For Life and the American Cancer Society's goal of a world without cancer. For eighteen days, become immersed in a world of enchantment where you can shop, enjoy fantasy art and performances, discover roleplay opportunities, and hear award-winning fantasy authors, all to a soundtrack provided by Fantasy Faire Radio. Come to the Faire, become part of the story, before the Fairelands once again recede into the mists for another year! Follow all the events at fantasyfairesl.wordpress.com

title: TheNest - Sunbird Emberwood
desc: Welcome to TheNest Sunbird Emberwood, a quiet forest village where time slows and a hint of magic lingers. Wander freely, lose yourself among the trees, and let dusk lead the way.

title: Velvet Bohème
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Tiger Lily Art Gallery
desc: A gallery exploring the dark side of human nature through the power of expressive painting and the ascetic aesthetics of neo-primitivism.

title: Etopia Earth Day Celebrations AIDFZyTo
desc: To help celebrate Earth Day for 2026, you're invited to explore, engage, and enjoy exhibits, activities, and discussions related to the theme "Our power, Our Planet". From wetlands exploration to bike trails, train rides to meditation spots, conversations and resources to cafes and gondola rides. Celebrations will kick off on 17 April and close with an Earth Day dance on 23 April at Etopia in Second Life.

title: Velvet Bohème idkytevs
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: BADU - VIETNAM
desc: Explore the beauty of Vietnam, Asharhia's new destination, inspired by the iconic Golden Bridge. Walk across the famous golden pathway held by giant hands, surrounded by mountains and lush scenery. Perfect for relaxing, exploring, and taking photos.

title: Norway Racing Festival yrTsIZhi
desc: Norway Racing Festival is a multi-day virtual motorsport event hosted in Second Life, bringing together racing enthusiasts, drivers, performers, and creators from around the world. The festival features races, drift shows, live performances, contests, and community-driven activities, all designed to create an immersive and exciting motorsport experience. The event runs from March 16th through the grand finale on the 22nd. Learn more at nrfevent.com

title: Tsumori City
desc: Discover Tsumori City, a peaceful yet vibrant mountain side destination near the scenic Hanami Path, where rich cultural influences blend with modern city life, surrounded by cherry blossoms, riverside walkways, and towering peaks, offering a warm, welcoming atmosphere filled with activities, good food, and beautiful places to explore.

title: Tsumori Hanami
desc: Along the quiet stretch of the Hanami Path, Tsumori Hanami unfolds in drifting petals, soft flowing water, and peaceful seasonal blooms. Visitors can follow the path through gentle scenery and calming light, enjoying a slow, soothing atmosphere perfect for quiet walks, reflection, and photography, with the cozy Sage Panda Café just a short stroll away for anyone wanting a warm treat nearby.

title: You're ACE Child Abuse Help Center
desc: You're ACE Child Abuse Help Center is a nonprofit organisation with the mission of raising awareness of ACEs (Adverse Childhood Experiences) and offers educational resources to help survivors of child abuse and trauma. Located in the General rated region of Rebeck, it is open to all.

title: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 DoIZENVX
desc: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 is this year’s installment of GUY Magazine’s annual Pride festival, hosted at The Portal. It features shopping, games, carnival rides, live acts, and parties throughout June, with an opening celebration on May 31 and events like live dance shows and a K-pop concert.

title: Bellisseria Birthday Bash QxuptISy
desc: Bellisseria Birthday Bash brings a week-long celebration to the Fairgrounds with tours, live DJs, and collectible passport stamps. Visitors can explore by air, sea, and land, take part in driving and flying challenges, and join community ceremonies from April 14–20. Learn more at gazetteorg.wordpress.com

title: Camp Cheertastic 2026
desc: Get ready to cheer your heart out! Camp Cheertastic is back and bigger than ever! SL's premier cheer event returns for its third year! From Friday, April 24th to Sunday, May 3rd, cheerleaders and dance performers from all across Second Life are invited to attend for ten days of skills, fun, learning, and community. Whether you are brand new to cheer or a seasoned squad veteran, this camp has something amazing in store for you!

title: Torvaldsburg Village
desc: Located along the southern borders of Torvaldsland on the waters edge, across from the Northern Forest lies the small Gorean Village of Torvaldsburg, founded by the Stromberg Clan. True BTB Gor where warriors rule with an iron fist. All craftsmen welcome.

title: Everwild Resort & Spa
desc: Everwild Resort and Spa is where luxury meets wild adventure. Set in a lush, tropical-inspired escape, Everwild blends high-end relaxation with unforgettable experiences. Unwind in the spa and wellness centre with soothing treatments, steam rooms, and tranquil spaces designed to melt everything away. Stay in one of the family-friendly themed lodges or enjoy a romantic hideaway designed for couples.

title: Port Talis
desc: Port Talis is a Gorean port city shaped by its people, where leadership shifts through roleplay and every choice carries weight. Cultures and castes intersect in a living story driven by conflict, ambition, and personal growth, with an emphasis on character depth and evolving narratives.

title: Bid the Lindens Bald bUOYCQwW
desc: Bid the Lindens & Moles Bald returns for its 10th annual showdown in support of Relay For Life in Second Life. Teams of Lindens and Moles literally put their hair on the line. Residents vote with their donations: the teams that raise the most keep their locks, while the team that raises the least will go bald until the next birthday celebrations. Voting opens during RelayStock on April 10 and runs through April 15, culminating in the always-entertaining Haircut Party from 12:00–2:30 PM SLT, with the clippers coming out at 2:15 PM SLT. Learn more at relayrockers.org/bidthelindensbald

title: VWBPE 2026 Conference BzfnytvE
desc: The Virtual Worlds Best Practices in Education Conference runs March 19–21, 2026. This open conference is organized by educators to showcase learning, tools, and methods for virtual environments. Join the event for three days of lectures, workshops, discussions, games, and more - including a keynote speech by the Founder of Second Life, Philip Rosedale, and interviews with other Linden Lab executives. Learn more at vwbpe.org
